meta.title: 传统文化与节日深入
meta.description: Intermediate advanced traditional culture and festival vocabulary and grammar in Chinese: customs, ancestral worship, and reunion.
meta.description_ko: 중국어 초중급~중급 심화 전통문화·명절 어휘와 문형: 풍습, 제사, 상봉.

questions.prompt: 「习俗」是什么意思？(What does 习俗 mean?)
「传承」是什么意思？(What does 传承 mean?)

explanation.en: 「祭祖」(jìzǔ) means "to worship/pay respects to ancestors".

questions.prompt: 「祭祖」是什么意思？(What does 祭祖 mean?)
choices: 祭祖(to worship/pay respects to ancestors)

questions.prompt: 「团圆」是什么意思？(What does 团圆 mean?)
「寓意」是什么意思？(What does 寓意 mean?)
这个地方的春节___跟其他地区不太一样。(This place's Chinese New Year customs are quite different from other regions.)
这项传统技艺已经___了几百年，现在面临失传的危险。(This traditional craft has been passed down for hundreds of years, now facing the danger of being lost.)
清明节的时候，人们会去___，缅怀先人。(During the Qingming Festival, people go to pay respects to ancestors, remembering their forebears.)
春节是一家人___的重要日子。(Chinese New Year is an important day for family reunion.)
红包的颜色是红色，因为红色有吉祥的___。(Red envelopes are red because red has an auspicious symbolic meaning.)
随着时代变化，很多传统习俗正在逐渐___。(As times change, many traditional customs are gradually disappearing.)
虽然生活节奏越来越快，___很多人依然坚持传统习俗。(Although the pace of life is getting faster, many people still maintain traditional customs.)
除了吃月饼___，中秋节还有赏月的传统。(Besides eating mooncakes, the Mid-Autumn Festival also has the tradition of moon-viewing.)
这个节日___代代相传，已经有上千年的历史了。(This festival has been passed down from generation to generation, already has thousands of years of history.)
为了保护传统文化，政府___了一系列保护措施。(In order to protect traditional culture, the government implemented a series of protective measures.)
年轻一代对传统节日的___越来越淡薄，值得我们思考。(The younger generation's sense of traditional festivals is becoming increasingly weak, worth our reflection.)
这个古老的仪式___了当地人对自然的敬畏。(This ancient ritual reflects the local people's reverence for nature.)
为了让年轻人了解传统文化，学校___了很多相关的课程。(In order to help young people understand traditional culture, schools have opened many related courses.)

explanation.ko: 「凝聚」(níngjù)는 '응집하다, 결집하다'라는 뜻으로 심혈을 담고 있음을 나타낸다.

questions.prompt: 这种传统手工艺___了匠人几十年的心血。(This traditional handicraft embodies decades of the craftsman's dedication.)
这个古镇因为保留了完整的传统建筑，成为了热门___景点。(This ancient town, having preserved complete traditional architecture, became a popular tourist attraction.)

explanation.en: 「不太」(not very) must come before 一样 (the same): 不太一样 (not 一样不太).
explanation.ko: 「不太」는 '一样' 앞에 와야 하므로 '不太一样'이 맞다.

questions.prompt: 这个地方的春节习俗跟其他地区一样不太。(This place's Chinese New Year customs are quite different from other regions.) — find the error
choices: 这个地方的春节习俗跟其他地区不太一样。
这个地方的春节习俗跟其他地区一样不太。
这个地方的春节习俗不太跟其他地区一样。
这个地方的春节习俗跟不太其他地区一样。

explanation.en: 「但是」must come at the start of the second clause, before 很多人: 但是很多人〜 (not 很多人但是〜).
explanation.ko: 「但是」는 두 번째 절의 맨 앞, '很多人' 앞에 와야 하므로 '但是很多人〜'이 맞다.

questions.prompt: 虽然生活节奏越来越快，很多人但是依然坚持传统习俗。(Although the pace of life is getting faster, many people still maintain traditional customs.) — find the error
choices: 虽然生活节奏越来越快，但是很多人依然坚持传统习俗。
虽然生活节奏越来越快，很多人但是依然坚持传统习俗。
虽然生活节奏越来越快，但是依然很多人坚持传统习俗。
虽然生活节奏越来越快，很多人依然但是坚持传统习俗。

explanation.en: 「一直」(continuously) must come before the verb phrase 代代相传 (passed down generation to generation): 一直代代相传 (not 代代相传一直).
explanation.ko: 「一直」는 동사구 '代代相传' 앞에 와야 하므로 '一直代代相传'이 맞다.

questions.prompt: 这个节日代代相传一直，已经有上千年的历史了。(This festival has been passed down from generation to generation.) — find the error
choices: 这个节日一直代代相传，已经有上千年的历史了。
这个节日代代相传一直，已经有上千年的历史了。
这个节日代代一直相传，已经有上千年的历史了。
这个节日代代相传，已经一直有上千年的历史了。

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 这个地方的春节习俗跟其他地区不太一样 ("This place's Chinese New Year customs are quite different from other regions").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '这个地方的春节习俗跟其他地区不太一样' (이 지역의 설날 풍습은 다른 지역과 조금 다르다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 这个地方的春节习俗__________。(This place's Chinese New Year customs are quite different from other regions.)

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 虽然生活节奏越来越快，但是很多人依然坚持传统习俗 ("Although the pace of life is getting faster, many people still maintain traditional customs").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '虽然生活节奏越来越快，但是很多人依然坚持传统习俗' (생활 리듬이 점점 빨라지고 있지만 많은 사람들이 여전히 전통 풍습을 지키고 있다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 虽然生活节奏越来越快，__________坚持传统习俗。(Although the pace of life is getting faster, many people still maintain traditional customs.)
